exercises.title: Compliance Checklist
exercises.description: Create a comprehensive FIPS compliance checklist for PQC deployment.
hints: Reference NIST CAVP for algorithm testing

exercises.title: Constant-Time Audit
exercises.description: Analyze code patterns that violate constant-time requirements.
hints: Look for secret-dependent branches, memory access, early returns

exercises.title: Implementation Review
exercises.description: Create an implementation security review guide.
hints: Cover constant-time, input validation, error handling

exercises.title: Validation Process
exercises.description: Document the FIPS 140-3 validation process for PQC.
